sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71350" key="nwga/leuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νωγᾰ´λ-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, in pl., <sense id="n71350.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">νώγαλα</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0415.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Arar.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
